texto: What makes for a good marriage isn't necessarily what makes for a good romantic relationship. Marriage isn't a passion-fest; it's a partnership formed to run a very small, mundane and often boring non-profit business. And I mean this in a good way.
explicacao: Citação de Lori Gottlieb sobre temas ligados a negocios. “What makes for a good marriage isn't necessarily what makes for a good romantic relationship. Mar…” articula negocios, marriage, reflexao em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como casamento e reflexao.
